channel.title: Solar on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Solar on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: From Fintech to Energy Abundance: Unpacking My Latest Conversation on Founders Only
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the transition from building UBX to driving energy abundance in the Philippines with 1882 Energy Ventures.

item.title: Solviva
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An AboitizPower-backed venture removing the high upfront costs of solar adoption through an innovative ‘Rent-to-Own’ financing model for Filipino homeowners and MSMEs.
